<!--
Thanks for the contribution! A few quick notes that help the review go fast.

If this PR adds a community template, please drop the .nyxtemplate file into
`community/templates/` with a clear, URL-safe filename (no spaces or `?:*`).
The filename minus the extension becomes the template's slug on the gallery.
CI lints in a single round; no follow-up commits are required.

If this PR is anything else (App code, docs, scripts, fixes), delete the
"Submission checklist" section below.
-->

## Submission checklist (community templates only)

- [ ] I dropped exactly one `.nyxtemplate` file into `community/templates/`.
- [ ] The filename is URL-safe (e.g. `My-Cool-Template.nyxtemplate`).
- [ ] I filled in the **Community Sharing** section in the NyxAstra editor
      (author, license, category) before exporting.
- [ ] The cover was generated by this template (no external imagery).
- [ ] The prompt body contains no API keys, passwords, or personal info.
- [ ] I've read [CONTENT_POLICY.md](community/CONTENT_POLICY.md).
